raw_response:
I agree with the consensus. One additional key point I want to emphasize is that proper use of sprues ensures better heat dissipation during the cooling process after casting, which indirectly contributes to maintaining structural integrity and reducing thermal stresses on the finished restoration. Therefore, while the main function described in option A correctly identifies the initial purpose of a sprue, understanding their broader impact on overall quality further solidifies why they serve so critically well in dental casting.

Answer Choice: A
Token Count: ~506 Words Including Analysis Structure. Answer choice: A. Agree with the consensus. Additional emphasis added regarding heat dissipation benefits post-casting.
